announcements.body:
This is a test announcement for v1.5.0.

[Release notes](https://github.com/DepartedReality/dr-sim-manager-releases/releases/tag/v1.5.0)

announcements.title: Updated to v1.4.0
announcements.body:
### Highlights
- Hosted announcements system
- Licensing improvements
- Bug fixes and performance improvements

[Full release notes](https://github.com/DepartedReality/dr-sim-manager-releases/releases/tag/v1.4.0)

announcements.title: Announcements are here!
announcements.body:
DR Sim Manager now supports in-app announcements. You'll see important updates, maintenance notices, and release highlights right here.

You can always access past announcements from the right-click context menu.
